name: PT Krida Jaringan Nusantara Tbk
summary: PT Krida Jaringan Nusantara Tbk provides courier services to banking, telecommunications, package shipment, and other sectors in Indonesia and internationally. It offers freight forwarding; collection, processing, transportation, and delivery services. The company also engages in the goods collection, courier agency, and warehousing and storage businesses; and sending of goods through rail, land, sea, and air transportation, as well as packaging of goods. In addition, it provides cargo consolidation, cargo space, and customs management. The company was founded in 1998 and is headquartered in Jakarta Pusat, Indonesia. PT Krida Jaringan Nusantara Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Grafindo Karya Nusantara.
